text: Artificial intelligence, or AI, is a branch of computer science that focuses on creating systems capable of performing tasks that normally require human intelligence. One key aspect of AI is machine learning, where computers learn from data without being explicitly programmed for every step. A more advanced form is deep learning, which uses neural networks inspired by the human brain to process complex information. AI has many applications in daily life, such as virtual assistants, personalized recommendations on streaming platforms, and facial recognition in smartphones. It also powers self-driving cars and helps doctors diagnose diseases more accurately.
